name: Customer Files
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Customer Files"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the customer files add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the customer management section find the Customer Files add-on, and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once activated, the "}, {"text": "Files", "bold": true}, {"text": " section will appear on each customer's card in the control panel:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add a file, drag-n-drop the file on the grey box or click on the "}, {"text": "Browse", "bold": true}, {"text": " / "}, {"text": "Choose File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and select the file. You can remove the file by clicking on the red cross of the right-hand side of the file details."}]}]
